waiting_for: Pullback to EMA21 (30014.10) for LIMIT fill on EMA_BOUNCE long entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Strong uptrend intact (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Previous LIMIT at old EMA21 (29996) was not filled as price rallied ~30 pts. EMA21 has risen to 30014.10; price now sits 15.15 pts above it. A pullback to the rising EMA21 offers a trend-following entry with defined risk. Targeting the 30100 major psychological level (30095 after 5pt buffer) provides 80.9 pts reward vs 40 pts risk (stop 40 pts below entry, ~10 pts below EMA150). R/R 2.02:1 exceeds 1.3 minimum. Stochastic at 62.57 shows ample upside room before overbought. Resting LIMIT at EMA21 captures the pullback without requiring confirmation candle.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. Trend is strongly bullish with aligned EMAs. Stochastic (62.57) is not overbought. Nearest bullish FVG below (29950-29967) is 74 pts away — too distant for acceptable R/R on a counter-trend fill. Price holds well above the 30000 psychological level. Shorting a healthy uptrend pullback lacks confluence and violates trend-following discipline.
